settings.hero_slide_1_sub: Authentic Chinese-exclusive Pokémon — unavailable anywhere else in Australia.
settings.hero_slide_2_sub: Chinese-exclusive One Piece sets, sealed and shipped from Melbourne.
settings.exp_1_desc: CN-exclusive sets, promos, and alt arts were never released outside mainland China. Genuinely rare in the West.
settings.exp_2_desc: We source directly from CN distributors. Every product is verified before listing.
settings.exp_3_desc: All stock is held in Melbourne. Orders placed before 2pm AEST ship same day.
settings.review_1_quote: Got my Crimson Haze CN display in two days. Legit sealed product, can't find this anywhere else in AU.
settings.review_2_quote: Love the specialist support. Asked about a specific One Piece CN set and got a proper answer, not a bot reply.
settings.review_3_quote: These CN Pokémon sets are incredible. Couldn't find the Cyber Judge box anywhere. Found it here at a fair price.
settings.newsletter_headline: BE FIRST WHEN CN DROPS LAND
settings.newsletter_sub: New sets, restocks, and limited runs. We notify you before they go live.
